name: arifOS-APEX-G
description: Constitutional governance server — 13 canonical tools with F1-F13 floor enforcement. All tool names use arif_* canonical naming.

entries.name: arifOS Command Center
entries.description: Interactive MCP cockpit for governed session, ops, judge, forge, gateway, and vault review.

invariants: authorization may not widen without authority_transition
session continuity must persist across tool handoff
canonical tool identity must remain explicit in every envelope

tools.name: arif_ping
tools.description: Lightweight liveness probe — confirms kernel reachability.

tools.name: arif_selftest
tools.description: Constitutional integrity probe — verifies the floor stack is intact.

tools.name: arif_init
tools.description: Start a governed session and bind identity/context.

tools.name: arif_observe
tools.description: Observe live signals from the environment and runtime.

tools.name: arif_think
tools.description: Run governed reasoning over evidence and active context.

tools.name: arif_critique
tools.description: Critique a candidate action against values, risk, and floors.

tools.name: arif_kernel_route
tools.description: Route work through the constitutional kernel and routing policy.

tools.name: arif_forge
tools.description: Execute an approved action through the forge lane.

tools.name: arif_judge
tools.description: Deliberate on a candidate action and return a verdict path.

tools.name: arif_seal
tools.description: Record the governed outcome into the audit trail.

tools.name: arif_measure
tools.description: Measure operational state, economics, and execution thermodynamics.

tools.name: arif_memory_recall
tools.description: Recall relevant prior context and anchored memory.

tools.name: arif_fetch
tools.description: Fetch evidence from external or local sources with traceability.

tools.name: arif_compose
tools.description: Compose a governed response aligned to active mandate and evidence.

tools.name: arif_gateway_connect
tools.description: Bridge into federated capability lanes through governed routing.

resourceTemplates.name: Ephemeral Instance
resourceTemplates.description: Active session state and governance context.

prompts.name: system
prompts.description: Constitutional system context — arifOS F1-F13 governance floor

prompts.name: judge
prompts.description: 888_JUDGE verdict engine context — deliberative decision protocol

prompts.name: init
prompts.description: 000_INIT session anchor context — temporal + identity grounding

prompts.name: rsi
prompts.description: Recursive Self-Improvement meta-skill — AGI reflection protocol

prompts.name: ortho
prompts.description: Orthogonal correction meta-skill — drift detection and correction

prompts.name: epistemic
prompts.description: Epistemic hygiene meta-skill — uncertainty and confidence framing

prompts.name: governance
prompts.description: Governance awareness meta-skill — constitutional floor context

prompts.name: entropy
prompts.description: Entropy management meta-skill — disorder detection and ordering

primary_app.name: arifOS Command Center MCP
primary_app.description: Interactive governance cockpit for arifOS MCP.
